name: Screen Color Filter
author: Ava
description: Wash the screen in a soft tint. Night mode moods from Home Assistant.
detail_description: Full-screen translucent tint above every layer — pick off, red, blue, dark, yellow, green, or gray from Home Assistant. Touch input still passes through for night-mode moods.

config.label: Filter Opacity
config.dialogHint: Default 30. Lower values keep content readable; higher values deepen the tint.
